tests.try-finally-no-error.test.js: try-finally without error runs both blocks
tests.try-finally-with-error.test.js: try-finally with error runs finally then propagates
tests.catch-skipped.test.js: catch is skipped when no error, finally still runs
tests.catch-rethrow.test.js: catch rethrows, finally runs, error propagates
tests.catch-no-param.test.js: catch without parameter works with finally
tests.return-in-try.test.js: return in try, finally still runs
tests.return-in-catch.test.js: return in catch, finally still runs
tests.return-in-finally.test.js: return in finally overrides return in try
tests.return-conditional.test.js: conditional return in try with finally
tests.return-try-no-error.test.js: return in try with catch+finally, no error
tests.return-multiple.test.js: multiple return paths in try with finally
